CC support window — latest_known → 2.1.208

Soft adoption-coverage advance. The strict manual_override pin holds: supported_floor stays 2.1.206, so no ork user is forced to upgrade. Only the adoption-nudge ceiling moves.

The three markers after this change

supported_floor = 2.1.206 ← MIN required (users below this get a ⚠ warning) latest_known = 2.1.208 ← highest CC ork's adoption covers (nudge ceiling) ◄ advanced latest = 2.1.206 ← support-window head (frozen by the strict pin)

What a running CC version triggers

ork verified zero exposure to 2.1.207's two breaking changes (no ${user_config} shell hooks, no project-level plugin config). 2.1.208 is incremental (auto-mode rule caching, leak fixes) — all no-op/upside. Full per-version triage: docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.207-208-triage-2026-07-14.md. Source of truth: shared/cc-support.json → stamped by scripts/stamp-cc-support.mjs.
